title: lithocardium umbraculiferum
intro: Lithocardium umbraculiferum, a plant species native to tropical Asia, is also known as the umbrella tree due to its umbrella-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and prevent the formation of kidney stones. The health benefits of lithocardium umbraculiferum include reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease, preventing urinary tract infections, and acting as a diuretic to remove excess fluids from the body. In herbal preparations, lithocardium umbraculiferum is often combined with other herbs to create teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
